title: I've lost my confetti on my Status column!
excerpt: We’re still setting up Monday CRM and are using the Deals board - it used to show a confetti animation when our ‘Won’ status was selected but doesn’t anymore? I’ve checked my Monday.labs and this feature is ‘Activated’, …

posts.author: Littlesar (Sarah Young)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re still setting up Monday CRM and are using the Deals board - it used to show a confetti animation when our ‘Won’ status was selected but doesn’t anymore? I’ve checked my Monday.labs and this feature is ‘Activated’, but I can’t work out why it’s no longer working or how to specify that my ‘Won’ status is the one I want to trigger the confetti?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oh no!

To rule out any potential contributors, can you confirm that no changes have been made to the colour selected via the status column settings, indicating the items been completed?

posts.author: Littlesar (Sarah Young)
posts.cookedHtml: We have had to make changes to be able to use Monday.com because the default does not work for our workflow - but ‘Done’ became ‘Won’ and the colour remained the same. The confetti still worked until last week. I just want to be able to assign the confetti animation to the ‘Won’ stage but can’t find the setting to do this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your reply Sarah. If you go to the status column settings by clicking the 3-dot ellipis and selecting customize status column you should be able to check if the green colour still constitutes completion (which triggers the animation):

Screen Shot 2023-06-13 at 10.27.14 am868×644 50.2 KB

Screen Shot 2023-06-13 at 10.27.28 am696×612 29.1 KB

If the green colour is ticked, then this might be a bug for our technical team to investigate. Please feel free to send me a private message so we can look further into this
